$comment: OpenFin manifest for the AG-Grid Customization Platform demo. Run with `npm run dev:openfin` from the repo root — that boots Vite + hands this manifest URL to `@openfin/node-adapter`'s launch(), which auto-provisions the runtime on first run.

startup_app.name: grid-customizer-demo
startup_app.$comment-layout: 1440×900 matches the viewport the e2e tests + screenshot tooling use; resizable so multi-grid dashboards can expand.
startup_app.$comment-chrome: frame=true keeps the OS title bar (minimize/close/etc). alwaysOnTop=false — popouts pin themselves via `openFinWindowOpener({ alwaysOnTop: true })`, not the root window.
startup_app.$comment-perf: preloading chromium-affinity so popouts from `fin.Window.create` share the same renderer process — avoids multi-process IPC for the cross-window React tree described in PopoutPortal.

$comment-devtools: devtools_port + --remote-debugging-port=9090 together expose the OpenFin runtime to Chrome DevTools — including SharedWorkers (data-plane v2). Open chrome://inspect#devices in a separate Chrome, add 'localhost:9090' in Configure..., the SharedWorker appears under 'Other'. See docs/DEBUGGING_SHARED_WORKER.md for full steps.
